name: Prism: Get Scene Files
description: Lists scene files for an entity/department/task. Wraps core.entities.getScenefiles(entity, department=..., task=...).
python_code:
from src.nodes.base import BaseNode
from src.utils.prism_core import resolve_prism_core
from src.utils.prism_config import resolve_cfg, get_departments, resolve_dept_folder, build_abbrev_map

class PrismGetSceneFilesNode(BaseNode):
    name = "Prism: Get Scene Files"
    category = "DCCs"

    def __init__(self):
        super().__init__(use_exec=False)
        self.icon_path = "icons/prism_icon.png"
        self.add_input("core", "any")
        self.add_input("entity", "dict")
        self.add_input("department", "string", widget_type="text", default="")
        self.add_input("task", "string", widget_type="text", default="")
        self.add_output("scenefiles", "list")
        self.add_output("latest", "string")
        self.add_output("count", "int")

    async def execute(self, inputs):
        core = resolve_prism_core(inputs)
        entity = inputs.get('entity') or {}
        dept_input = (inputs.get('department') or '').strip()
        task_input = (inputs.get('task') or '').strip().lower()
        if core is None:
            self.log_error('No PrismCore found.')
            return {'scenefiles': [], 'latest': '', 'count': 0}
        cfg_path = resolve_cfg(core=core, entity=entity)
        entity_type = entity.get('type', 'shot')
        dept_defs = get_departments(core, cfg_path, entity_type)
        dept_abbrev = resolve_dept_folder(dept_input, dept_defs) if dept_input else ''
        if dept_input and not dept_abbrev:
            dept_abbrev = dept_input.lower()
        abbrev_map = build_abbrev_map(dept_defs)
        try:
            files = list(core.entities.getScenefiles(entity) or [])
            if dept_abbrev:
                def dept_matches(f):
                    sf_dept = (f.get('department', f.get('step', '')) or '').lower()
                    if sf_dept == dept_abbrev:
                        return True
                    entry = abbrev_map.get(sf_dept)
                    return entry is not None and entry.get('abbreviation') == dept_abbrev
                files = [f for f in files if isinstance(f, dict) and dept_matches(f)]
            if task_input:
                files = [f for f in files if isinstance(f, dict)
                         and (f.get('task', '') or '').lower() == task_input]
            latest = ''
            if files:
                last = files[-1]
                latest = last.get('path', last.get('filepath', str(last))) if isinstance(last, dict) else str(last)
            self.log_info(f'Found {len(files)} scene file(s).')
            return {'scenefiles': files, 'latest': latest, 'count': len(files)}
        except Exception as e:
            self.log_error(f'getScenefiles failed: {e}')
            return {'scenefiles': [], 'latest': '', 'count': 0}

def register_node():
    return PrismGetSceneFilesNode
